A

App - Class in Unnamed Package
Main GUI Application class for the Temperature Converter.
App() - Constructor for class App
 

B

BelowAbsoluteZeroException - Exception Class in Unnamed Package
Custom Exception thrown when a temperature value falls below the physical limit of Absolute Zero.
BelowAbsoluteZeroException(double, TemperatureUnit) - Constructor for exception class BelowAbsoluteZeroException
Constructs a BelowAbsoluteZeroException with the invalid value and its corresponding unit.

C

CELSIUS - Enum constant in enum class TemperatureUnit
 
convert(double, TemperatureUnit, TemperatureUnit) - Static method in class TemperatureConverter
Converts a temperature value from a source unit to a target unit.

F

FAHRENHEIT - Enum constant in enum class TemperatureUnit
 
fromKelvin(double, TemperatureUnit) - Static method in class TemperatureConverter
Converts a temperature value in Kelvin to the specified target unit.
fromString(String) - Static method in enum class TemperatureUnit
Finds a TemperatureUnit by its display name.

G

getAbsoluteZero() - Method in enum class TemperatureUnit
Gets the thermodynamic limit of absolute zero in this unit.
getFormulaExplanation(double, TemperatureUnit, TemperatureUnit, double) - Static method in class TemperatureConverter
Generates a clear, user-friendly step-by-step mathematical formula explanation for a conversion process.
getInvalidValue() - Method in exception class BelowAbsoluteZeroException
Gets the invalid temperature value that caused the exception.
getName() - Method in enum class TemperatureUnit
Gets the user-friendly name of this unit.
getSymbol() - Method in enum class TemperatureUnit
Gets the mathematical symbol representing this unit.
getUnit() - Method in exception class BelowAbsoluteZeroException
Gets the unit of the invalid temperature value.

K

KELVIN - Enum constant in enum class TemperatureUnit
 

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class App
Entry point for running the desktop GUI application.

R

RANKINE - Enum constant in enum class TemperatureUnit
 

S

start(Stage) - Method in class App
Starts and initializes the JavaFX Primary Stage.

T

TemperatureConverter - Class in Unnamed Package
Core utility and service class for handling temperature conversion arithmetic, validation, and mathematical explanations.
TemperatureUnit - Enum Class in Unnamed Package
Enumeration representing the supported temperature units.
ThermometerGauge - Class in Unnamed Package
A custom-drawn UI component that renders a stunning, dynamic, 3D glass thermometer.
ThermometerGauge() - Constructor for class ThermometerGauge
Constructs a ThermometerGauge component with default dimensions.
toCelsius(double, TemperatureUnit) - Static method in class TemperatureConverter
Converts any temperature value from its original unit to Celsius.
toKelvin(double, TemperatureUnit) - Static method in class TemperatureConverter
Converts any temperature value from its original unit to Kelvin.
toString() - Method in enum class TemperatureUnit
 

U

updateTemperature(double, TemperatureUnit) - Method in class ThermometerGauge
Updates the gauge with a new temperature value.

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class TemperatureUnit
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class TemperatureUnit
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
